title: Plugin Management
drag_hint: Drag ZIP plugin, manifest.json or plugin folder here
choose_description: Select a plugin ZIP file or a folder containing plugins
no_plugins_desc: No plugins installed. Put plugin files in the plugin directory and click refresh.
missing_deps_hint: Make sure all required dependencies are installed and enabled, otherwise the plugin may not work properly.
plugin_disabled_desc:
"{{name}}" has been disabled, and the following plugins depending on it are also disabled:
{{deps}}
confirm_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
cannot_delete_enabled: Cannot delete an enabled plugin, please disable it first
confirm_batch_delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {{count}} plugins?
all_plugins_latest: All plugins are up to date

permission.network_desc: Allows the plugin to send HTTP requests and access external networks. Malicious plugins may exploit this to exfiltrate data.
permission.fs_desc: Allows the plugin to read and write files within its directory.
permission.server_desc: Allows the plugin to read/write server files and retrieve server information.
permission.console_desc: Allows the plugin to send commands to a running Minecraft server.
permission.element_desc: Allows the plugin to manipulate DOM elements in the application interface (click, modify values, etc.).
permission.system_desc: Allows the plugin to access OS, CPU, memory and other system information.
permission.log_desc: Allows the plugin to output log messages.
permission.storage_desc: Allows the plugin to store and read its own data.
permission.api_desc: Allows the plugin to communicate with other plugins.
permission.ui_desc: Allows the plugin to inject custom HTML elements into the interface.
permission.ui_component_read_desc: Allows reading UI component properties, lists, and event listeners
permission.ui_component_write_desc: Allows modifying UI component properties and calling methods
permission.ui_component_proxy_desc: Allows intercepting and modifying UI component interaction events, can block original behavior, user confirmation required
permission.ui_component_create_desc: Allows the plugin to dynamically create new UI components and render them in the app.
permission.execute_program_desc: Allows the plugin to run executable programs declared in manifest.json within its directory. This is an extremely dangerous permission, malicious plugins may use it to execute arbitrary code.
permission.plugin_folder_access_desc: Allows the plugin to access the user's plugin folder. This is an extremely dangerous permission, malicious plugins may read or modify other plugins' data.
permission.critical_warning: This plugin requests extremely dangerous permissions that may seriously affect your system. Please ensure you trust the source of this plugin.
